stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Which of the following statements is true?

options.a: On a flight from Zurich to Rome you do not have to worry about any moderate and/or severe turbulence at FL150.
options.b: Between Paris and Amsterdam, moderate icing conditions are forecast above FL140.
options.c: The wind speed in the core of the jet stream just to the west of Rome is approximately 80 kt.
options.d: Moderate, occasionally severe turbulence can be expected over Frankfurt at FL290.
